title: Phase 2: new entry point + Cobra root + first reference tool
description: cmd/miro/main.go + root command with global flags (--token, --json, --dry-run, --agent, --yes, --idempotent, --select). Reference tool: 'miro list-boards' wired against internal/miro/ client, with table-driven tests using net/http/httptest. Establishes the pattern that Phase 3 tools follow.
notes:
Session 2 (12-05-2026): Phase 2 reference shape delivered.

Done:
- cmd/miro/main.go — entry point with signal-aware context; ExitCode mapping
- cmd/miro/root.go — newRootCmd builds the *cobra.Command + clictx.Globals; persistent flags --token --json --dry-run --agent --yes --idempotent --select; PersistentPreRunE normalizes --agent → --json + --yes
- cmd/miro/root_test.go — root registers boards subtree, --help lists global flags, Normalize wiring
- internal/tools/clictx/{context,context_test}.go — Globals struct with BuildClient (honors injected *miro.Client for tests), EmitJSON (with --select filtering, indented output), EmitDryRun; full test coverage including end-to-end httptest path
- internal/tools/boards/{types,list,list_test}.go — Board + ListResponse types, NewCmd registers `boards list` subcommand, runList helper called from RunE; tests cover path building, happy path, --dry-run skips HTTP, 401 → ExitAuth, --select filtering

Module rename: per Olga request, dropped -pp- from module name. miro-developer-platform-pp-cli → miro-cli across all 227 files (Go imports, go.mod, Makefile, .goreleaser.yaml). Old binary directory cmd/miro-developer-platform-pp-cli/ still builds as the legacy binary; goes away in Phase 6 (miro-cli-rpk).

Smoke test:
- `miro --help` shows all 7 global flags
- `miro boards list --dry-run --limit 5` prints "DRY-RUN GET /v2/boards?limit=5"
- `--dry-run` does not require a token (short-circuits before BuildClient)

Tests: 28 tests pass across cmd/miro, internal/miro, internal/tools/clictx, internal/tools/boards. All race-detector clean.

Pattern Phase 3 follows:
1. New per-resource package under internal/tools/<resource>/
2. NewCmd(g *clictx.Globals) returns the parent *cobra.Command
3. Per-verb constructors newXxxCmd(g) return subcommand
4. runXxx(ctx, g, flags) is a package-private helper called from RunE — directly testable against httptest
5. Tests use miro.New with BaseURL pointing at httptest.NewServer and inject the client via clictx.Globals.Client

Unblocks: miro-cli-8fq (boards 3a), miro-cli-j3x (typed items 3b), miro-cli-8jr (items+bulk+tags etc 3c).
close_reason: Phase 2 delivered. The foundation slice this depends on (internal/miro/{errors,config,client}.go from mkw) is in place. mkw stays open for the additive Phase 1 deferred items (ratelimit/cache/auth/redact); those don't block any Phase 3 wave since the verbs use only client.Do/Get/Post/etc which are stable.

title: Phase 1: hand-authored foundation packages
description: Build internal/miro/ — client, config, auth, errors, ratelimit, redact, cache — with table-driven tests. Replaces the printing-press-generated internal/client + internal/config + internal/cliutil. Coexists with the old foundation until Phase 6 cleanup. Must support: bearer-token auth via flag/env/config, JSON encode/decode, typed APIError with exit-code mapping, 30s timeout, context cancellation, token redaction in errors. Tests: HTTP roundtripper mock + table cases for status codes, redaction, config precedence.
notes:
Session 1 (12-05-2026): delivered slice 1 of Phase 1.

Done:
- internal/miro/errors.go — APIError, ConfigError, ExitCode mapping per README contract
- internal/miro/config.go — token resolution (flag > env), DefaultBaseURL
- internal/miro/client.go — HTTP client with Bearer auth, JSON encode/decode, context cancellation, 10MB response cap, 30s default timeout
- 22 tests (race-detector clean): token never appears in error output, exit codes match HTTP status, body never appears in stringer

Deferred to next session(s) of Phase 1:
- ratelimit.go — token-bucket per Miro's L1-L4 tiers (need to verify rates against api docs)
- redact.go — log/dump redaction helpers (errors.go already handles error-path redaction)
- cache.go — LRU+TTL for read-heavy GETs
- auth.go — token format validation (Miro token format check, scope inference if API exposes it)

Phase 2 (entry point + first reference tool) can start now even if remaining Phase 1 pieces aren't done; the new tools depend on client.go + config.go + errors.go which are stable.

Commit: TBD this session

title: Phase 5: security pass + CI
description: Token redaction in all log/error paths, input validation at command boundary, share-board allowlist env (MIRO_SHARE_ALLOWED_DOMAINS), destructive-op --yes gate, panic recovery at handler entry. CI: go mod verify, go mod tidy drift check, govulncheck, gosec per rules/mcp-server-patterns.md supply-chain section. .github/workflows/ci.yml.

title: Phase 3c: port items + bulk + tags + groups + mindmap + tables + exports + misc (35 tools)
description: Remaining categories: items (list_all/list/get/update/delete/bulk_create/bulk_update/bulk_delete/get_items_by_tag), tags (8), groups (6), mindmap (4), board_members (4), tables (2), exports (3), misc (3). Spawn parallel subagents one-per-category after Phase 3b.

title: Phase 3b: port typed-item verbs (~40 tools)
description: Port create/get/update/delete for sticky, shape, text, card, app_card, connector, frame, image, doc, embed. Spawn parallel subagents one-per-resource (10 agents) per parallel-tool-implementation.md after foundation lands. Each agent ports 4 verbs for its resource with tests.

title: Phase 3a: port boards verbs (12 tools)
description: Port miro_list_boards, miro_get_board, miro_create_board, miro_copy_board, miro_update_board, miro_delete_board, miro_find_board, miro_search_board, miro_share_board, miro_get_board_content, miro_get_board_summary, miro_get_board_picture, miro_get_audit_log, miro_generate_diagram as hand-authored Cobra subcommands under internal/tools/boards/. Each with table-driven tests. share_board must be gated by share-allowlist env (HG-3 from code-review-prompts.md).
notes:
Session 2 (12-05-2026): 5 of 14 boards verbs shipped.

Done:
- miro boards list — GET /v2/boards with team/project/query/owner/sort/limit/offset filters (Phase 2 reference)
- miro boards get <board_id> — GET /v2/boards/{board_id}
- miro boards create --name --description --team-id — POST /v2/boards
- miro boards update <board_id> --name --description — PATCH /v2/boards/{board_id}
- miro boards delete <board_id> --yes — DELETE /v2/boards/{board_id} (refuses without --yes; ExitConfig=10 on refusal)

CRUD trio tests cover: happy path against httptest, --dry-run short-circuit, 404 → ExitNotFound, 401 → ExitAuth, empty board_id rejected, empty name rejected on create, no-field-set rejected on update, delete-without-yes rejected, --agent implies --yes via Normalize. 38 tests total in internal/tools/boards.

Remaining (9 verbs):
- miro boards copy <board_id> — PUT /v2/boards?copy_from=<id> with optional body
- miro boards find <query> — composite (list + filter); see miro-mcp-server miro/boards_find.go
- miro boards search <query> — full search across all accessible content; see miro/search.go
- miro boards share <board_id> — PATCH /v2/boards/{board_id}/members (HG-3 share-allowlist gate REQUIRED)
- miro boards content <board_id> — synthesized: list items + format for AI summary; see miro/boards_summary.go content variant
- miro boards summary <board_id> — synthesized: counts items by type, returns one-line summary
- miro boards picture <board_id> — GET /v2/boards/{board_id}/picture (binary response — needs Client extension for non-JSON)
- miro boards audit — GET /v2/audit/logs (enterprise-only)
- miro boards diagram <board_id> --dsl ... — POST diagram creation; see miro/diagrams.go

share_board MUST be implemented WITH the env-var allowlist gate (HG-3 from code-review-prompts.md) before the verb ships. Reference: miro-mcp-server/tools/share_allowlist.go.

picture verb requires Client.Do extension to surface non-JSON responses (we currently always json.Unmarshal). Smallest change: add a method that returns the raw []byte response.

content/summary/find/search are composites (multiple API calls + formatting). Lower priority — defer to a follow-up bead once the simple ones ship.

Pattern proven by CRUD trio: one file per verb, runXxx package-private helper for direct testing, NewCmd composes via newXxxCmd(g) constructors.

title: Phase 6: delete printing-press infrastructure
description: One-shot cleanup commit: delete cmd/miro-developer-platform-pp-cli/, internal/{cli,store,types,client,config,cache,cliutil}/, scripts/regenerate.sh, scripts/printing-press-version.txt, specs/, .printing-press.json, docs/{SPEC-PATCHES,BUGFIXES,GENERATED-README}.md, composites/. Update .goreleaser.yaml binary id, Makefile build target, README install instructions, SKILL.md bin name, HANDOFF.md. Predicated on Phases 1-5 reaching feature parity. Verify post-delete: go build + go test pass, miro --help shows all 91 verbs.

title: Phase 4: performance pass
description: Connection pooling on http.Transport, response caching with TTL for read-heavy GET endpoints (list_boards, list_items, get_board), bounded-concurrency fan-out for bulk ops (default 8, --concurrency flag), optional local SQLite sync for offline FTS/SQL (port miro-cli's old internal/store layer if useful).
